Plan ecommerce, campaign launches, gifting windows and retail operations around global demand peaks.

GGlobal events · holidays · countdown intelligence
16. Feb. 2026

🏮 Lunar New Year's Eve

Cultural

The peak travel, reunion dinner and gifting moment before Lunar New Year.

17. Feb. 2026

🧧 Spring Festival

Cultural

Lunar New Year centered on family reunions, red envelopes, travel and seasonal commerce.

8. März 2026

♀ International Women's Day

Cultural

A global awareness and campaign day for gender equity, workplace culture and social programs.

17. März 2026

☘️ St. Patrick's Day

Cultural

A cultural celebration with parades, tourism, hospitality and themed retail campaigns.

10. Mai 2026

💐 Mother's Day

Cultural

A high-intent gifting, dining, flower, beauty and family travel period.

18. Juni 2026

🛒 618 Shopping Festival

Marketing

Mid-year ecommerce promotion window with platform, brand and logistics planning demand.

21. Juni 2026

🧘 International Yoga Day

Cultural

A wellness and community participation day for health, fitness and lifestyle campaigns.

21. Juni 2026

👔 Father's Day

Cultural

A family and gifting observance that drives retail, restaurant, travel and content planning demand.

15. Aug. 2026

🎒 Back to School Season

Marketing

Retail season for supplies, apparel, electronics, school services and family planning.

31. Okt. 2026

🎃 Halloween

Cultural

A costume, candy, entertainment and retail event with strong social media demand.

11. Nov. 2026

🛍️ Singles' Day

Marketing

A major ecommerce promotion day with global cross-border retail impact.

27. Nov. 2026

⚡ Black Friday

Marketing

Peak promotional event following US Thanksgiving, important for ecommerce, stores and affiliate content.

30. Nov. 2026

💻 Cyber Monday

Marketing

Online retail and subscription offer planning day after Black Friday weekend.

31. Dez. 2026

🥂 New Year's Eve

Cultural

Year-end travel, nightlife, restaurant, broadcast and countdown programming moment.
